Uses of Class
Dungeon_Classes.Floor

Packages that use Floor
Package
Description
Character_Classes
 
Dungeon_Classes
 

  • Uses of Floor in Character_Classes

    Methods in Character_Classes with parameters of type Floor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PlayableChar.collect(DestructibleTile tile, Floor floor)
    Extracts items or currency value arrays directly out of destructible tile types, updating internal inventory and purging map structures afterwards.
    void
    PlayableChar.dig(Tile tile, Floor floor)
    Executes wall destruction processing against blocked target map coordinates.
    void
    EnemyChar.dropGold(Floor floor)
    Spawns a gold treasure tile at the enemy's current grid position upon defeat.
    void
    EnemyChar.move(Floor floor, PlayableChar entity)
    Manages the enemy's turn execution.
    void
    GameCharacter.move(int direction, Floor floor)
    Moves the character to the next tile if valid.
    void
    PlayableChar.move(char direction, Floor floor)
    Implements step direction handling ('w','a','s','d'), combat conflict discovery, hazard step environmental damage logging, and destructible path routing interactions.
    protected Tile
    GameCharacter.nextTile(int direction, Floor floor)
    Calculates the adjacent tile coordinate based on an input direction.

  • Uses of Floor in Dungeon_Classes

    Methods in Dungeon_Classes that return Floor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Floor[]
    Dungeon.getFloors()
    Retrieves the array holding floor records.
    Methods in Dungeon_Classes with parameters of type Floor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Dungeon.assignFloors(Floor[] catalogue)
    Assigns a series of floor structures matching a specific map index catalogue.
    void
    Dungeon.setFloors(Floor[] floors)
    Updates the replacement array structure of floor nodes.
    Constructors in Dungeon_Classes with parameters of type Floor
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Dungeon(String name, int dungeonNum, int numFloors, Floor[] floors, NPChar member)
    Constructs a dungeon environment with predefined floors, resetting the current floor tracking index to its baseline starting stage.
